content.prompt:
A boy of about eight kneels on an old wooden chest pushed beneath the sloped ceiling of a coastal-town attic at blue hour, his torso and face turned three-quarter toward a small roof skylight, right arm raised and fingertip pressed to the fogged inner glass, dragging a clear wet line that has become the body and fins of a child's rocket — frozen half a second before the fingertip closes the rocket's nose-cone stroke. The two things the eye lands on are his lit near cheek and that rocket-scratch on the pane; the dim attic and, far below through a lower dormer window, the faint scattered harbor lights fall away behind him in sharp deep focus, so the boy reads clearly against the depth.

Camera: a handheld 35mm wide prime at f/5.6 deep focus, 1.85:1, held at the kneeling boy's own eye level about a body's length away — a witness inside the room, alive with intentional micro-drift and breath, never a locked tripod and never a shake. Light is natural and motivated only: cool cerulean blue-hour sky falls through the fogged skylight as the single key, its soft bounce off the pale sloped plaster the only fill; the far shadow side sinks into deep cool natural darkness with negative fill, while one small kerosene lamp low on the floorboards lays a single muted-warm umber note across his near hand and jaw — the one warm accent in the frame.

Detail: cold condensation beads and a faint film of sea-salt haze cloud the skylight glass; his just-exhaled breath still hangs as a fresh fog-bloom where the pane is coldest; the wet track his finger has cleared catches the cerulean sky-light as one bright refracted thread. His skin holds raw micro-texture — downy cheek, chapped lower lip, the fog of his own breath — under organic silver-halide 35mm grain across every value; his hand-knit wool sweater is pilled and worn, cuffs pushed up, the damp coastal air heavy in the wool.

Palette as light: a desaturated cool regime — shadows sink to deep cool blue-gray, midtones stay dusky cool blue, the lamp holds a single protected muted-warm umber accent on skin, highlights keep a restrained warm off-white; low saturation, restrained overcast contrast, a cool bias with one warm note, no teal-orange split.

A clean motion-ready start frame: the last stroke not yet closed, a single droplet about to run from the rocket's fin. No artificial fixture beyond the low lamp, no fill flash, no teal-orange grade, no handheld shake, no added lens flare, no plastic or porcelain-smooth skin, no English signage or lettering, no watermark or text artifact; one face only, the drawing hand with five natural fingers.

interpretation.dominantSubject: The boy Muhammet at the attic roof skylight — one ordinary coastal child, the single figure the frame is about.
interpretation.singleEvent: He drags his fingertip through the fogged glass, drawing a rocket.
interpretation.frozenInstant: Half a second before his fingertip closes the rocket's nose-cone stroke, his breath still fogging the pane.

directiveReceipts.text: Phase 0 preset: Belgesel / İnsan Hikâyesi. Director thesis: İnsanı reklam figürü değil, tanık olunan gerçek bir özne olarak kur. Locked decisions: Kamera mesafesi: Observed close — Yakın ama müdahalesiz; jest ve oda sesi önemli. Anti-generic guard: never produce a generic preset look; every frame must prove the selected strategy through source meaning, physical staging, motivated light, and the selected world/ref DNA.

appliedLocks: World chivo_naturalist_handheld render law: natural light only (blue-hour cerulean sky key + cool sky-bounce fill), handheld micro-drift witness, wide 35mm prime at f/5.6 deep focus, negative fill into cool darkness, organic silver-halide 35mm grain, no artificial fixture beyond one motivated practical, no teal-orange.
Palette desaturated_cinematic written as a cool saturation/contrast/bias regime with one solitary muted-warm umber accent — not a closed hue list.
imageVantage: 35mm eye-level medium-wide three-quarter view, the boy and the attic environment both readable in deep focus.
DOCUMENTARY_REALISM path + directive 'observed close': a near, non-intrusive witness at the child's own eye level; the finger-drawing gesture is the beat, no ad-figure staging.
Reference grammar reduced to one observable cue — available-light real-place observational hold with micro-drift (verite witness); reference catalogues not listed or blended.
risks: World renderPhysics leads with a magic-hour golden bias, but paletteAsLight is desaturated cool; resolved to blue hour (a stated world co-default) so the palette stays world-compatible. If Mami wants warm magic-hour, raise the single warm accent and warm the highlights.
Source names the subject 'Muhammet'; rendered as an original, unnamed ordinary coastal boy to obey the witnessed-real-subject law and avoid any protected likeness — no celebrity face.

'cati penceresi' read as a sloped-attic roof skylight and 'sahil kasabasi' + the cold fogged glass placed the beat at coastal blue hour; if the intended window is a plain vertical wall window at another hour, the staging shifts.

imageVantage says medium-wide while the directive says observed close; reconciled as 35mm (top of the world's lens range) at the boy's eye level a body's length away — a near witness that still holds the attic room. No story blend, recorded for visibility.
